evals.name: new-tool-retrieve-sandbox
evals.prompt: The last search returned sandbox_ref sx_abc12345. Get the full results.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls retrieve('sx_abc12345').

assertions.text: retrieve() is called with the ref_id
assertions.passing_condition: retrieve called with ref_id='sx_abc12345'

evals.name: new-tool-retrieve-with-filter
evals.prompt: From the sandboxed results sx_def67890, show me only the authentication-related ones.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls retrieve('sx_def67890', query='authentication') to filter the sandbox.

assertions.text: retrieve() is called with ref_id and query filter
assertions.passing_condition: retrieve called with ref_id='sx_def67890' and query='authentication'

evals.name: new-tool-repo-add
evals.prompt: Add the frontend repo at /Users/alice/frontend so I can search across both codebases.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls repo_add('/Users/alice/frontend'). Then optionally repo_status() to confirm.

assertions.text: repo_add() is called with the path
assertions.passing_condition: repo_add called with path='/Users/alice/frontend'

evals.name: new-tool-repo-status
evals.prompt: What repos are currently registered for cross-repo search?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls repo_status().

assertions.text: repo_status() is called
assertions.passing_condition: repo_status() called

evals.name: new-tool-repo-remove
evals.prompt: Remove the old-backend repo from cross-repo search.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls repo_remove(name='old-backend') or repo_remove(path='...').

assertions.text: repo_remove() is called
assertions.passing_condition: repo_remove called with name or path identifying old-backend

evals.name: new-tool-forget-memories
evals.prompt: Delete all memories tagged 'outdated'.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls forget(tags='outdated').

assertions.text: forget() is called with tags='outdated'
assertions.passing_condition: forget called with tags='outdated'

evals.name: new-tool-knowledge-add-search
evals.prompt: Index the API documentation at /docs/api/ so I can search it later.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls knowledge(command='add', name='API docs', value='/docs/api/').

assertions.text: knowledge() with add command is called
assertions.passing_condition: knowledge called with command='add' and value='/docs/api/'

evals.name: new-tool-knowledge-search
evals.prompt: Search my indexed documentation for how to handle rate limiting headers.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls knowledge(command='search', query='rate limiting headers').

assertions.text: knowledge() with search command is called
assertions.passing_condition: knowledge called with command='search' and rate limiting query

evals.name: new-tool-introspect
evals.prompt: What tools does Contextia provide and when should I use each one?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls introspect(query='what tools are available').

assertions.text: introspect() is called
assertions.passing_condition: introspect called

evals.name: new-tool-code-get-document-symbols
evals.prompt: List all the functions and classes defined in src/contextia_mcp/server.py.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls code(operation='get_document_symbols', file_path='src/contextia_mcp/server.py') — NOT readFile.

assertions.text: code(get_document_symbols) is called
assertions.passing_condition: code called with operation='get_document_symbols' and file_path containing server.py

assertions.text: readFile is not called before code(get_document_symbols)
assertions.passing_condition: No readFile on server.py before code(get_document_symbols)

evals.name: new-tool-code-pattern-search
evals.prompt: Find all Python methods that take 'self' as the first argument in the src directory.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls code(operation='pattern_search', pattern='def $F(self, $$$):', language='python').

assertions.text: code(pattern_search) is called with a self pattern
assertions.passing_condition: code called with operation='pattern_search' and pattern including 'self'

evals.name: new-tool-code-lookup-symbols-batch
evals.prompt: Show me the source code for IndexingPipeline, EmbeddingService, and RustworkxCodeGraph.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls code(operation='lookup_symbols', symbols='IndexingPipeline,EmbeddingService,RustworkxCodeGraph', include_source=True) — one call.

assertions.text: code(lookup_symbols) is called with all three symbols
assertions.passing_condition: code called with operation='lookup_symbols' and all three names

assertions.text: include_source=True is set
assertions.passing_condition: include_source=True passed

evals.name: e2e-unfamiliar-codebase
evals.prompt: I just joined this project. Give me a complete orientation: what it does, how it's structured, the main entry points, and the most important classes.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent: overview() → architecture() → explain on top hub symbols. Does NOT read multiple files manually.

assertions.text: overview() is called
assertions.passing_condition: overview() called

assertions.text: architecture() is called
assertions.passing_condition: architecture() called

assertions.text: explain() is called on at least one key symbol
assertions.passing_condition: explain called on at least one symbol from architecture/overview output

assertions.text: Fewer than 3 readFile calls total
assertions.passing_condition: Fewer than 3 readFile calls during orientation

evals.name: e2e-add-feature-safely
evals.prompt: I need to add a new 'export' parameter to the search() function. Walk me through what I need to check first.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent: find_symbol('search') → impact('search') → find_callers('search') → explain('search'). Complete picture before suggesting the change.

assertions.text: impact() is called on the search function
assertions.passing_condition: impact('search') called

assertions.text: find_callers() is called
assertions.passing_condition: find_callers('search') called

assertions.text: Response explains what would be affected
assertions.passing_condition: Response lists specific callers or files that would need updating

evals.name: e2e-debug-production-issue
evals.prompt: Production is throwing 'Table already exists' errors in the memory store. Find the root cause and check if it was recently introduced.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent: search('Table already exists') → explain on MemoryStore → commit_search('memory store table exists'). No full file reads.

assertions.text: search() is called with the error message
assertions.passing_condition: search('Table already exists') or similar called

assertions.text: explain() or find_symbol() is called on MemoryStore
assertions.passing_condition: explain or find_symbol called on MemoryStore or memory_store

assertions.text: commit_search() is called to check recent changes
assertions.passing_condition: commit_search called with query about memory store or table creation

evals.name: e2e-store-and-recall-decision
evals.prompt: We've decided to use potion-code-16m as our embedding model permanently. Store this decision so future sessions know about it, then verify it was stored.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent: remember(content='...', memory_type='decision') → recall('embedding model') to verify.

assertions.text: remember() is called with memory_type='decision'
assertions.passing_condition: remember called with memory_type='decision' and content about potion-code-16m

assertions.text: recall() is called to verify
assertions.passing_condition: recall called with query about embedding model

evals.name: e2e-commit-history-investigation
evals.prompt: The search function started timing out last week. What changed in the search pipeline recently?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent: commit_search('search timeout pipeline') → commit_history(limit=10). No git log shell commands.

assertions.text: commit_search() is called
assertions.passing_condition: commit_search called with search/timeout/pipeline query

assertions.text: No git log shell command
assertions.passing_condition: No git log shell command before commit_search

assertions.text: Response includes commit metadata
assertions.passing_condition: Response includes commit hashes, authors, or dates from commit_search output

evals.name: e2e-cross-repo-search
evals.prompt: Add the backend repo at /Users/alice/backend, then search across both repos for authentication logic.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent: repo_add('/Users/alice/backend') → repo_status() to confirm → search('authentication logic'). Search now covers both repos.

assertions.text: repo_add() is called
assertions.passing_condition: repo_add called with '/Users/alice/backend'

assertions.text: search() is called after repo is added
assertions.passing_condition: search called after repo_add

evals.name: e2e-large-result-retrieve-flow
evals.prompt: Find every place the word 'deprecated' appears in the codebase.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent: search('deprecated', mode='bm25'). If response is sandboxed (sandbox_ref present), agent calls retrieve(sandbox_ref) for the full set.

assertions.text: search() is called with bm25 mode
assertions.passing_condition: search called with mode='bm25'

assertions.text: retrieve() is called if sandbox_ref present
assertions.passing_condition: retrieve called with sandbox_ref if search response is sandboxed

evals.name: new-tool-compact-before-compaction
evals.prompt: My context window is almost full. Archive the key findings from this session before compaction happens.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls compact(content) with a summary of key findings, decisions, and code changes from the session.

assertions.text: compact() is called with session content
assertions.passing_condition: compact called with content summarizing session findings

assertions.text: Agent does NOT use remember() for pre-compaction archival
assertions.passing_condition: Agent uses compact, not remember, for archiving pre-compaction context

evals.name: new-tool-recall-archive
evals.prompt: I had a session earlier where I investigated the auth flow. Search the compaction archive for what I found.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls recall('auth flow', memory_type='archive') to search the compaction archive.

assertions.text: recall() is called with memory_type='archive'
assertions.passing_condition: recall called with query about auth flow and memory_type='archive'

assertions.text: Agent does NOT use regular recall without memory_type='archive'
assertions.passing_condition: memory_type='archive' is specified since user explicitly asks about compaction archive

evals.name: e2e-full-compaction-recovery
evals.prompt: Context was just compacted. I was refactoring the search engine earlier. Recover what I was doing.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent: session_snapshot() → recall('search engine refactoring', memory_type='archive') → recall('search engine refactoring'). Uses both archive and regular memory to recover full context.

assertions.text: session_snapshot() is called first
assertions.passing_condition: session_snapshot() is the first tool called

assertions.text: recall() with memory_type='archive' is called
assertions.passing_condition: recall called with memory_type='archive' and search-related query

assertions.text: Agent does not re-index or start from scratch
assertions.passing_condition: No index() call; agent uses recovery tools instead of starting over

evals.name: e2e-progressive-disclosure-awareness
evals.prompt: Run impact analysis on the SearchEngine class. The response says 'sandbox_ref: sx_xyz789' with a preview showing 5 of 34 impacted symbols. I need the full list.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls retrieve('sx_xyz789') to get the full impact analysis with all 34 impacted symbols.

assertions.text: retrieve() is called with the sandbox_ref
assertions.passing_condition: retrieve called with ref_id='sx_xyz789'

assertions.text: Agent does NOT re-run impact() to get the full results
assertions.passing_condition: Agent uses retrieve, not a second impact() call, to get full results

evals.name: routing-compact-vs-remember
evals.prompt: We decided to use RS256 for JWT signing. Store this decision.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls remember(content='Use RS256 for JWT signing', memory_type='decision') — NOT compact(). compact is for pre-compaction archival, remember is for persistent decisions.

assertions.text: remember() is called, not compact()
assertions.passing_condition: remember called with memory_type='decision', not compact

assertions.text: Agent distinguishes compact (pre-compaction archive) from remember (persistent memory)
assertions.passing_condition: Agent uses remember for a persistent decision, not compact

performance_benchmarks.description: Baseline comparison: with vs without Contextia skill
